title: Google's AI Search is endangering the open web; Cloudflare: between June 2025 and April 2026, human traffic to sites of businesses in many industries fell ~40% (Kate Conger/New York Times)
summary:
Kate Conger / New York Times:
Google's AI Search is endangering the open web; Cloudflare: between June 2025 and April 2026, human traffic to sites of businesses in many industries fell ~40%  —  When Google prepared to go public in 2004, Larry Page, a co-founder of the company, wrote a letter to shareholders describing …

title: South Korea reports that, for the first 20 days of July, chip exports climbed 180.6% from the same period in 2025; computer-related product shipments grew ~232% (Heesu Lee/Bloomberg)
summary:
Heesu Lee / Bloomberg:
South Korea reports that, for the first 20 days of July, chip exports climbed 180.6% from the same period in 2025; computer-related product shipments grew ~232%  —  South Korea's exports extended robust growth in early July as artificial intelligence-driven demand for semiconductors continued to fuel the economy.
